```{r}
  "Model4" = Test_Uni_sig_data,
  "Model5" = Test_Uni_sig_data,
  Test_Uni_sig_data
)

Results_Risk <- tryCatch({
  predict_survival_risk_group_f(
    selected_train_data = best_train_feat,
    selected_test_data  = best_test_feat,
    Feature_List        = best_feature_list
  )
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("⚠️  Risk-group prediction failed:", e$message, "\n")
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(Results_Risk)) {
  Train_results <- Results_Risk$Train_results
  Test_results  <- Results_Risk$Test_results
  cat("Risk-group misclassification results:\n")
  print(Results_Risk$misclassification_results)
  cat("Test set risk predictions:\n")
  print(head(Test_results))
}
cat("✅ Step 9 complete\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 10: KM OVERLAY PLOT (km_overlay_plot_f)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("\n📊 STEP 10: KM overlay plot\n")
cat("============================\n")

if (!is.null(Results_Risk)) {
  KM_plot <- tryCatch({
    km_overlay_plot_f(
      Train_results    = Train_results,
      Test_results     = Test_results,
      survcurve_te_data = survCurves_data,
      selected_sample  = sample_id,
      font_size        = 12,
      train_palette    = c("firebrick", "steelblue"),
      test_curve_col   = "darkgreen",
      test_curve_size  = 1.2,
      test_curve_lty   = "dashed",
      annotation_col   = "black"
    )
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("⚠️  KM overlay failed:", e$message, "\n")
    NULL
  })

  if (!is.null(KM_plot)) {
    png("PRAD_KM_Overlay_Plot.png", width = 1000, height = 700, res = 120)
    print(KM_plot)
    dev.off()
    cat("📈 KM overlay plot saved: PRAD_KM_Overlay_Plot.png\n")
  }
}
cat("✅ Step 10 complete\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# STEP 11: NOMOGRAM (Nomogram_generate_f)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("\n📊 STEP 11: Nomogram\n")
cat("=====================\n")

# Nomogram uses training data with selected features
# Build nomogram feature list (clinical + top univariate genes)
n_nomo <- min(5, length(top_genes_4))
nomo_feature_list <- data.frame(
  ID = c("Age", "gender", "gleason_score",
         top_genes_4[1:n_nomo]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Combine Train_Clin + Train_Uni_sig_data for the nomogram input
nomo_cols <- intersect(nomo_feature_list$ID,
                       colnames(Train_Uni_sig_data))
nomo_train <- cbind(Train_Clin,
                    Train_Uni_sig_data[, setdiff(nomo_cols, colnames(Train_Clin)),
                                       drop = FALSE])

nomo_result <- tryCatch({
  Nomogram_generate_f(
    data         = nomo_train,
    Feature_List = nomo_feature_list,
    surv_time    = "OS_month",
    surv_event   = "OS",
    font_size    = 0.75,
    axis_cex     = 0.55,
    tcl_len      = 0.5,
    label_margin = 0.5,
    col_grid     = gray(c(0.85, 0.95))
  )
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("⚠️  Nomogram failed:", e$message, "\n")
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(nomo_result)) {
  cat("Nomogram C-index:\n")
  print(nomo_result$C_index_mat)
  # Nomogram is rendered to an active device by the function;
  # wrap it to save to PNG
  png("PRAD_Nomogram.png", width = 1100, height = 700, res = 120)
  Nomogram_generate_f(
    data         = nomo_train,
    Feature_List = nomo_feature_list,
    surv_time    = "OS_month",
    surv_event   = "OS",
    font_size    = 0.75,
    axis_cex     = 0.55,
    tcl_len      = 0.5,
    label_margin = 0.5,
    col_grid     = gray(c(0.85, 0.95))
  )
  dev.off()
  cat("📈 Nomogram saved: PRAD_Nomogram.png\n")
}
cat("✅ Step 11 complete\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# SUPPLEMENTARY PLOTS
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("\n🎨 Generating supplementary plots...\n")

# ── Plot A: Volcano plot of univariate genes ─────────────────────────────────
plot_volcano <- function(uni_df, title = "TCGA-PRAD: Univariate Survival Genes") {
  # Ensure expected columns exist
  if (!all(c("pvalue", "HR") %in% colnames(uni_df))) {
    cat("⚠️  Volcano: missing 'pvalue' or 'HR' columns – skipping\n")
    return(NULL)
  }

  df <- uni_df
  df$Gene    <- if ("Gene_Symbol" %in% colnames(df)) df$Gene_Symbol else rownames(df)
  df$Gene[is.na(df$Gene)] <- rownames(df)[is.na(df$Gene)]
  df$log2HR  <- log2(df$HR)
  df$negLogP <- -log10(df$pvalue)
  df$Direction <- ifelse(df$HR > 1, "High-risk (HR > 1)", "Protective (HR < 1)")
  df$label_gene <- ifelse(df$negLogP > quantile(df$negLogP, 0.90, na.rm = TRUE),
                          df$Gene, "")

  ggplot(df, aes(x = log2HR, y = negLogP, colour = Direction, label = label_gene)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.8) +
    geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 15, segment.size = 0.3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey40") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("High-risk (HR > 1)"  = "#E63946",
                                   "Protective (HR < 1)" = "#457B9D")) +
    labs(title = title,
         x = "log₂(Hazard Ratio)",
         y = "-log₁₀(p-value)",
         colour = "Direction",
         caption = sprintf("n = %d significant genes | dashed line: p = 0.05",
                           nrow(df))) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
}

vol_plot <- plot_volcano(Univariate_Suv_Sig_G_L)
if (!is.null(vol_plot)) {
  ggsave("PRAD_Volcano_Plot.png", vol_plot,
         width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 150)
  cat("📈 Volcano plot saved: PRAD_Volcano_Plot.png\n")
}

# ── Plot B: Top-20 HR bar plot ───────────────────────────────────────────────
if ("HR" %in% colnames(Univariate_Suv_Sig_G_L) &&
    "Gene_Symbol" %in% colnames(Univariate_Suv_Sig_G_L)) {

  df_top <- Univariate_Suv_Sig_G_L %>%
    filter(!is.na(Gene_Symbol)) %>%
    mutate(Gene = Gene_Symbol,
           log2HR = log2(HR),
           Direction = ifelse(HR > 1, "High-risk", "Protective")) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(log2HR))) %>%
    head(20)

  hr_bar <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = reorder(Gene, log2HR),
                                y = log2HR, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("High-risk"  = "#E63946",
                                  "Protective" = "#457B9D")) +
    labs(title = "TCGA-PRAD: Top 20 Survival Genes by Hazard Ratio",
         x = NULL, y = "log₂(Hazard Ratio)",
         fill = "Effect") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

  ggsave("PRAD_Top20_HR_Barplot.png", hr_bar,
         width = 9, height = 6, dpi = 150)
  cat("📈 HR bar plot saved: PRAD_Top20_HR_Barplot.png\n")
}

# ── Plot C: C-index comparison across models ─────────────────────────────────
if (nrow(model_perf_df) > 0) {
  perf_long <- model_perf_df %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(Train_C_index, Test_C_index),
                        names_to = "Set", values_to = "C_index") %>%
    mutate(Set = gsub("_C_index", "", Set))

  perf_plot <- ggplot(perf_long,
                      aes(x = Model, y = C_index, fill = Set)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.6) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey50") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Train" = "#2A9D8F", "Test" = "#E76F51")) +
    ylim(0, 1) +
    labs(title = "TCGA-PRAD: MTLR Model Performance (C-index)",
         x = "Model", y = "C-index", fill = "Dataset") +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

  ggsave("PRAD_Model_CIndex_Comparison.png", perf_plot,
         width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 150)
  cat("📈 C-index comparison plot saved: PRAD_Model_CIndex_Comparison.png\n")
}

# ── Plot D: Kaplan-Meier on full dataset (reference) ─────────────────────────
km_ref <- tryCatch({
  km_fit <- survfit(Surv(OS_month, OS) ~ 1, data = New_data)
  km_plot_ref <- ggsurvplot(km_fit,
    data        = New_data,
    risk.table  = TRUE,
    conf.int    = TRUE,
    palette     = "#2A9D8F",
    title       = "TCGA-PRAD: Overall Survival (Full Cohort, KM Estimate)",
    xlab        = "Time (months)",
    ylab        = "Survival Probability",
    ggtheme     = theme_bw(base_size = 12),
    risk.table.height = 0.25
  )
  png("PRAD_KM_Full_Cohort.png", width = 900, height = 650, res = 120)
  print(km_plot_ref)
  dev.off()
  cat("📈 Full-cohort KM plot saved: PRAD_KM_Full_Cohort.png\n")
}, error = function(e) cat("⚠️  KM reference plot failed:", e$message, "\n"))

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# FINAL EXPORT: COMPREHENSIVE EXCEL WORKBOOK
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("\n💾 Writing comprehensive Excel workbook...\n")

wb_final <- createWorkbook()

# Sheet 1: Survival genes
addWorksheet(wb_final, "Survival_Genes")
writeData(wb_final, "Survival_Genes", Univariate_Suv_Sig_G_L, rowNames = TRUE)

# Sheet 2: LASSO genes (if available)
if (!is.null(Train_Lasso_key_variables)) {
  addWorksheet(wb_final, "LASSO_Genes")
  writeData(wb_final, "LASSO_Genes", Train_Lasso_key_variables, rowNames = FALSE)
}

# Sheet 3: Model performance
addWorksheet(wb_final, "Model_Performance")
writeData(wb_final, "Model_Performance", model_perf_df, rowNames = FALSE)

# Sheet 4: Significant clinical features
if (!is.null(Uni_Sur_Sig_clin_List) && nrow(Uni_Sur_Sig_clin_List) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb_final, "Significant_Clinical")
  writeData(wb_final, "Significant_Clinical", Uni_Sur_Sig_clin_List, rowNames = TRUE)
}

# Sheet 5: PH test summary
if (!is.null(PH_Summary) && nrow(PH_Summary) > 0) {
  addWorksheet(wb_final, "PH_Test_Summary")
  writeData(wb_final, "PH_Test_Summary", PH_Summary, rowNames = FALSE)
}

saveWorkbook(wb_final, "PRAD_CPSM_Complete_Results.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
cat("💾 Complete results workbook: PRAD_CPSM_Complete_Results.xlsx\n")

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# SESSION INFO
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

cat("\n📋 Session Info\n")
cat("================\n")
sessionInfo()

cat("\n\n🎉 CPSM TCGA-PRAD PIPELINE COMPLETE!\n")
cat("=======================================\n")
cat("Outputs generated:\n")
cat("  CSV:   PRAD_Univariate_Survival_Genes_Full.csv\n")
cat("  CSV:   PRAD_LASSO_selected_genes.csv\n")
cat("  CSV:   PRAD_Model_Performance.csv\n")
cat("  XLSX:  PRAD_Univariate_Survival_Genes_Full.xlsx\n")
cat("  XLSX:  PRAD_CPSM_Complete_Results.xlsx\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Volcano_Plot.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Top20_HR_Barplot.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Model_CIndex_Comparison.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_KM_Full_Cohort.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_KM_Overlay_Plot.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Survival_Curves_All.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Survival_Curves_Highlighted.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_MeanMedian_Survival_All.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_MeanMedian_Survival_Highlighted.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_LASSO_lambda_plot.png\n")
cat("  PNG:   PRAD_Nomogram.png\n")
```
